item.title: A brain-based explanation for being accident-prone
item.description: Being labeled "accident-prone" may not be just bad luck. This explores how attention, impulsivity, and awareness can influence everyday mishaps and why there may be a brain-based explanation behind them.

media:content.media:title: A brain-based explanation for being accident-prone
media:content.media:description: Being labeled "accident-prone" may not be just bad luck. This explores how attention, impulsivity, and awareness can influence everyday mishaps and why there may be a brain-based explanation behind them.

item.title: A Key ADHD Fact Many Women Miss
item.description: Many women experience ADHD differently than the stereotypes suggest. This explores an often-overlooked aspect of ADHD that can delay recognition, understanding, and diagnosis for years.

media:content.media:title: A Key ADHD Fact Many Women Miss
media:content.media:description: Many women experience ADHD differently than the stereotypes suggest. This explores an often-overlooked aspect of ADHD that can delay recognition, understanding, and diagnosis for years.

item.title: Nobody Told You Why You Stopped Feeling Like Yourself in Your 40s

media:content.media:title: Nobody Told You Why You Stopped Feeling Like Yourself in Your 40s

item.title: Is it brain fog or luteal phase? ��‍��
item.description: If your brain gets weird on a schedule, this might explain a lot.

item.title: When a simple task turns into a freeze
item.description: A relatable look at the mental freeze that can happen when a simple task suddenly feels overwhelming.

media:content.media:title: When a simple task turns into a freeze
media:content.media:description: A relatable look at the mental freeze that can happen when a simple task suddenly feels overwhelming.

item.title: A conversation worth having about ADHD and PMDD
item.description: A thoughtful look at why ADHD and PMDD deserve a real conversation.

media:content.media:title: A conversation worth having about ADHD and PMDD
media:content.media:description: A thoughtful look at why ADHD and PMDD deserve a real conversation.

item.title: That weird body feeling? It’s not just you
item.description: A gentle reminder to keep for the days when your brain feels loud.

media:content.media:title: That weird body feeling? It’s not just you
media:content.media:description: A gentle reminder to keep for the days when your brain feels loud.

item.title: Suppressing Emotions Doesn’t Solve Them
item.description: A brief reminder that pushing emotions aside doesn’t make them go away.

media:content.media:title: Suppressing Emotions Doesn’t Solve Them
media:content.media:description: A brief reminder that pushing emotions aside doesn’t make them go away.

item.title: Productivity can come with a cost
item.description: A lighthearted take on how intense focus can sometimes mean forgetting basic needs like lunch.

media:content.media:title: Productivity can come with a cost
media:content.media:description: A lighthearted take on how intense focus can sometimes mean forgetting basic needs like lunch.

item.title: Is it ADHD or hormones?
item.description: A look at how ADHD and perimenopause symptoms can overlap in ways that are easy to miss.

media:content.media:title: Is it ADHD or hormones?
media:content.media:description: A look at how ADHD and perimenopause symptoms can overlap in ways that are easy to miss.

item.title: Sounds an ADHD Brain Keeps Picking
item.description: Some sounds just click with certain minds. Whether it's organized chaos, familiar chatter, or steady ambient noise, this one's for the people whose brains focus best with a little noise in the background.

media:content.media:title: Sounds an ADHD Brain Keeps Picking
media:content.media:description: Some sounds just click with certain minds. Whether it's organized chaos, familiar chatter, or steady ambient noise, this one's for the people whose brains focus best with a little noise in the background.

item.title: Your sensitivity was never the problem
item.description: A thoughtful reminder that sensitivity can be a strength, not a flaw.

media:content.media:title: Your sensitivity was never the problem
media:content.media:description: A thoughtful reminder that sensitivity can be a strength, not a flaw.

item.title: Why You Were Never “Too Sensitive
item.description: A psychiatrist explains why being called “too sensitive” may not tell the full story.

media:content.media:title: Why You Were Never “Too Sensitive
media:content.media:description: A psychiatrist explains why being called “too sensitive” may not tell the full story.
